name: Star Rogue
short_description: Star Rogue is a sci-fi roguelike platformer. This pixel indie game will challenge you with a randomly generated spacestation full of deadly traps, collectable items, nasty enemies and strong bosses, each time you play it.
detailed_description:
Star Rogue is a sci-fi roguelike platformer. In this challenging pixel indie game you will take control over a brave space marine to investigate an abandoned space station full of traps, robots and aliens. In each playthrough you will encounter a different environment full of randomly arranged rooms. With the choice between several weapons, abilites and different items, your playing experience will be unique each time you play.

!!! ATTENTION !!!
This game is still in development! Here is a rough list of planned improvements:
  • Improved and more diverse enemy AI/movement
  • Better graphics and animations
  • More abilities, stages, rooms, enemies, bosses, items and unlocks

If you have any questions or want to contact me, feel free to write to:
starrogue [at] julianwehrmann [dot] com
